task_completion.description: Fuel costs are calculated for each route leg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column showing fuel costs for each of the 8 legs. The values should be based on 25 MPG and $3.80/gal (e.g., the first leg of 173 miles should show approximately $26.30).

task_completion.description: Driving times are calculated for each route leg
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column showing driving time for each of the 8 legs. The values should be the distance divided by 60 mph (e.g., the first leg of 173 miles should show approximately 2.88 hours).

task_completion.description: Cumulative mileage is calculated for the trip
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column showing cumulative mileage that increases with each leg, ending at exactly 1708 miles for the final leg.

task_completion.description: Total fuel cost and total driving time are calculated
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the total fuel cost (approx $259.62) and total driving time (approx 28.47 hours) calculated at the bottom of their respective columns or in a summary area.

task_completion.description: Trip feasibility is determined based on budget and time constraints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text, labels, or boolean values indicating whether the trip meets the $400 budget (it does) and the 24-hour time limit (it does not, as it takes ~28.5 hours).

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to edit the spreadsheet
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with the LibreOffice Calc application window to edit the spreadsheet, rather than using a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding values
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the formula bar in the screenshots to ensure the agent entered actual formulas (starting with '=') rather than typing hardcoded numbers for the calculations.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts to solve the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not use a terminal window to run a Python script or CLI tool to modify the spreadsheet file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Constants: 25 MPG, $3.80/gal gas, 60 mph speed. Total distance: 1,708 miles. Total fuel cost: $259.62 (Leg 1 is ~$26.30). Total drive time: 28.47 hours (Leg 1 is ~2.88 hours). Cumulative mileage ends at 1,708 miles. Budget constraint: $400 (Trip is UNDER budget). Time constraint: 24 hours (Trip is OVER time limit by ~4.47 hours).
